elements.title: Annie Knight
elements.contents: ... that Bonnie Blue's "1,000 men in a day" challenge inspired an event and a planned event by fellow sex workers Annie Knight (pictured) and Drake Von?

elements.title: Retro Mystery Club Vol.1: The Ise-Shima Case
elements.contents: ... that the development of the 2019 video game Retro Mystery Club Vol.1: The Ise-Shima Case started in 2010?

elements.title: Troadec family murders
elements.contents: ... that the Troadec family murders were committed over an inheritance dispute due to a myth involving gold bars?

elements.title: Miranda Oakley
elements.contents: ... that Miranda Oakley became the first woman to rope-solo The Nose in less than 24 hours?

elements.title: Communist Party of Transcarpathian Ukraine
elements.contents: ... that the Communist Party of Transcarpathian Ukraine lasted just over a year?

elements.title: Ashworth Moor Reservoir
elements.contents: ... that Ashworth Moor Reservoir was authorised by Parliament in 1877, but construction did not begin for more than 20 years?

elements.title: a planetary system
elements.contents: ... that scientists have discovered a planetary system that can be described as "inside-out"?

elements.title: pressure from credit card companies
elements.contents: ... that some video game stores removed their adult content under pressure from credit card companies?

elements.title: a North Carolina radio station
elements.contents: ... that a North Carolina radio station host asked his neighbors about 2001: A Space Odyssey on air—and went on to host Ask Your Neighbor for 29 years?
